text_original: Without going outside his door, one understands (all that takes place) under the sky;
text_normalized: Without going outside his door, one understands (all that takes place) under the sky;

text_original: without looking out from his window, one sees the Dao of Heaven.
text_normalized: without looking out from his window, one sees the Dao of Heaven.

text_original: The farther that one goes out (from himself), the less he knows.
text_normalized: The farther that one goes out (from himself), the less he knows.

text_original: Therefore the sages got their knowledge without travelling;
text_normalized: Therefore the sages got their knowledge without travelling;

text_original: gave their (right) names to things without seeing them;
text_normalized: gave their (right) names to things without seeing them;

text_original: and accomplished their ends without any purpose of doing so.
text_normalized: and accomplished their ends without any purpose of doing so.
